data.title: Machine Learning Models Improve Weather Prediction Accuracy
data.description: Meteorologists are using machine learning to achieve unprecedented accuracy in weather forecasting models.
data.keywords: machine learning, weather, prediction, meteorology, accuracy
data.snippet: New ML-based weather models have demonstrated accuracy improvements of up to 25% compared to traditional numerical weather prediction...
